LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OPENING, 21 PAGE BRIEF EXCEEDED THE 15 PAGE LIMIT SET BY CRC 3.1113(D). EVEN AFTER PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION CALLED THAT TO DEFENDANT'S ATTENTION, DEFENDANT FILED A 15 PAGE REPLY BRIEF EXCEEDING THE 10 PAGE LIMIT. DEFENDANT NEVER SOUGHT PERMISSION TO FILE EITHER OVERSIZED BRIEF CRC 3.1113 (E). PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1113(G) AND 3.1300(D) AND IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S CONTINUING FLAGRANT FLOUTING OF THE RULES GOVERNING OF THIS MOTION, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION NOT TO CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S OVERSIZED BRIEFS. THEREFORE, THE MOTION IS UNSUPPORTED BY A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OPENING, 21 PAGE BRIEF EXCEEDED THE 15 PAGE LIMIT SET BY CRC 3.1113(D). EVEN AFTER PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION CALLED THAT TO DEFENDANT'S ATTENTION, DEFENDANT FILED A 15 PAGE REPLY BRIEF EXCEEDING THE 10 PAGE LIMIT. DEFENDANT NEVER SOUGHT PERMISSION TO FILE EITHER OVERSIZED BRIEF CRC 3.1113 (E). PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1113(G) AND 3.1300(D) AND IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S CONTINUING FLAGRANT FLOUTING OF THE RULES GOVERNING OF THIS MOTION, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION NOT TO CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S OVERSIZED BRIEFS. THEREFORE, THE MOTION IS UNSUPPORTED BY A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)
